verifier_notes: Fresh independent verification. Service rewrite matches spec: strict_types, namespace App\Services, final class, three private readonly promoted deps in locked order, single deploy(array):array public method (2 public funcs total). All return branches carry the six canonical keys. Orchestration order Telegram->payment->install is correct. Manifest literal 'spawn.' . strtolower($request['agent_name']) appears exactly once. deploy() body has zero matches for ' new ', '::', ' static ', or try/catch. Test file has 3 in-file fakes (prefixed FakeAgentDeployer*), wires real services via constructor, zero PHPUnit mocks, all 7 locked test names present, happy-path canonical fixture and return literals present. Red artifact shows exit 2 with all 7 new tests erroring on undefined method; green artifact shows OK (37 tests, 142 assertions) exit 0. mtime ordering red(1776162251) < service(1776162267) < green(1776162272) confirmed. Live composer test reports OK (37 tests, 142 assertions) exit 0. All 10 prior tasks PASS; parallel running-state-mockup-steve-ive also PASS and included in no-regression check. Scope: only AgentDeployerService.php (rewrite) and AgentDeployerServiceTest.php (new) among code files.

criteria.reason: File starts with <?php then declare(strict_types=1); on line 2.
namespace App\Services; on line 4; final class AgentDeployerService on line 10.
Constructor promotes private readonly OnChainOSPaymentService $payment, KiloClawClientService $kiloclaw, TelegramBotRegistrarService $telegram in order; all three imported via use statements.
public function deploy(array $request): array on line 19. Exactly 2 public function occurrences (ctor + deploy).
All five return branches include keys status, stage, agent_name, error, kiloclaw_id, session_id.
Validate loop over agent_name, personality, telegram_bot_token, amount_usd in canonical order; returns invalid_request/validate with error 'missing or invalid: <keys>' before any downstream call.
allowlist not in required-keys list; not parsed.
Line 51 calls $this->telegram->validateToken($request['telegram_bot_token']) before payment and install.
Returns telegram_invalid/telegram_validate with 'telegram token invalid' error, kiloclaw_id and session_id null; no downstream calls.
Line 62 $this->payment->createCharge($request['amount_usd'], $request['agent_name']) runs after telegram validate.
Non-pending status returns payment_failed/payment; session_id taken from $charge['session_id'] ?? null.
Manifest built inline lines 75-80; 'spawn.' . strtolower($request['agent_name']) appears exactly once; $this->kiloclaw->install($manifest) on line 82.
Non-ready/booting returns install_failed/install with kiloclaw_id from install and session_id from charge.
Success branch returns deployed/complete with agent_name, error=null, install kiloclaw_id, charge session_id.
deploy() body has zero ' new ' matches.
deploy() body has zero '::' matches.
deploy() body has zero ' static ' matches.
deploy() body has zero try/catch matches.
Test file has declare(strict_types=1); namespace Tests\Unit\Services; extends PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase (via use).

Three in-file fakes: FakeAgentDeployerOnChainOSClient implements OnChainOSClient, FakeAgentDeployerKiloClawHttpClient implements KiloClawHttpClient, FakeAgentDeployerTelegramHttpClient implements TelegramHttpClient; each with recorder fields (callCount, nextResponse, nextException).

makeStack builds real OnChainOSPaymentService, KiloClawClientService, TelegramBotRegistrarService around fakes, then new AgentDeployerService($payment,$kiloclaw,$telegram). Zero createMock/getMockBuilder/MockObject occurrences.
All seven locked test method names present verbatim.
Happy path uses atlas, 'A laconic agent that ships code.', '123:abc', 10, sess_abc, kc_abc, '2026-04-14T10:00:00Z'; expected array asserted via assertSame matches canonical shape.

phpunit-red.txt: EXIT=2, all 7 new tests erroring on 'Call to undefined method ...::deploy()'. phpunit-green.txt: OK (37 tests, 142 assertions) EXIT=0. mtime red(1776162251) < service(1776162267) < green(1776162272).
Live rerun: composer test -> OK (37 tests, 142 assertions), exit 0. All 10 prior tasks PASS; parallel running-state-mockup-steve-ive also PASS.
Only app/Services/AgentDeployerService.php (rewrite) and tests/Unit/Services/AgentDeployerServiceTest.php (new) among code files; .phpunit.result.cache and parallel running mockup tolerated.

commands_run: awk '/public function deploy/,/^    }$/' app/Services/AgentDeployerService.php > /tmp/deploy_body.txt && grep -c ' new ' /tmp/deploy_body.txt; grep -c '::' /tmp/deploy_body.txt; grep -c ' static ' /tmp/deploy_body.txt; grep -cE '(try|catch)' /tmp/deploy_body.txt
for name in <7 locked test names>; do grep -c "$name" tests/Unit/Services/AgentDeployerServiceTest.php; done
